notes: Since 01.07.2023 LfP is bayernweit responsible for nursing recognition. Massive Ukrainian refugee cohort — expect this as the most common demo profession.
ZAABY = Zentrale Anerkennungsstelle für Approbationsberufe in Bayern. Ukrainian doctors are ~15% of the refugee professional cohort.

EMOTIONAL DEMO ROW. A common Ukrainian trauma: a cardiac surgeon flees the war and can practice as a general doctor after ZAABY approbation but must re-do specialty recognition through the Ärztekammer separately. Two-step process. Heartbreaking and demoable.
Same ZAABY as doctors — bayernweit for foreign dental qualifications.
Same ZAABY. Fee €400 for third-country qualifications requiring equivalence check.
RvM handles Gesundheitsfachberufe (non-nursing health) when work is in Mittelfranken.

EMOTIONAL DEMO ROW. Ukrainian midwives resettling in Bayern often bring their newborns with them. Recognition here is tender and specific — reg. by Hebammengesetz separately from nursing since 2020. RvM Gesundheitsfachberufe route.

EMOTIONAL DEMO ROW. The ''downgrade'' story: many Ukrainian teachers/engineers/mid-level professionals end up here because it's the fastest employment path. 6-12 month training after arrival. Story judges will feel.
For fields: Bauingenieurwesen, Gebäude- und Versorgungstechnik, Vermessungswesen. Other engineering fields go to Regierung von Schwaben.
For all engineering fields except civil/building/surveying. Regierung von Schwaben is bayernweit responsible.
Same as Elektroingenieur — non-Bau engineering fields.

IHK FOSA is the central body for ALL IHK-regulated foreign qualifications across Germany. Based in Nuremberg — nice pitch angle: the recognition authority for this profession is literally in the same city as the hackathon.
Same IHK FOSA — hospitality/gastronomy occupations.
Same IHK FOSA — commercial occupations.

HWK-Mfr address verified. Note: purely industrial welders (not Handwerk apprenticeship) may route through IHK FOSA instead.

authority_name: Bayerisches Staatsministerium für Unterricht und Kultus (StMUK)
notes: Formal Lehramtsanerkennung for third-country teachers is generally NOT possible in Bayern. Ukrainian teachers often can only work as substitutes. This is a real recognition dead-end and clerk should say so honestly.
For general school certificates (Abitur, Mittlere Reife etc.). Precedes many professional recognition processes.
Erzieher in Bayern is regulated. Common Ukrainian refugee retraining path — women who were teachers back home often retrain here. VERIFY exact routing tomorrow — may go through ZBFS instead.
Not a regulated profession under BQFG. Recognition is via Führerschein-Umschreibung at the local Fahrerlaubnisbehörde. Ukrainian licence holders have simplified conversion rules.

KuBB is the bayernweit coordination hotline for ANY recognition question. Use as fallback when profession is unclear. Hotline: Mon-Fri 10:00-12:00 + Mon/Tue/Thu 13:00-15:00. Also offers advice in Ukrainian and other refugee languages via partner network.
